name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Drop Pod homepage redesign (HomeV2) is live behind a default-on feature flag: single DEPLOY split-button, merged Intel Ticker, tabbed Career/Codex/Settings/Support nav, and a lightweight DemoCanvas background replace the 20-block MenuScreen scroll wall.
nextMilestone: Capture real-world Lighthouse LCP/CLS deltas and home_v2_deploy funnel conversion on production; if ≥200ms LCP improvement and non-regressed conversion, remove the v1 fallback and simplify further.
